headline: RVTY Expands Endocrine Diagnostics With FDA-Cleared Testosterone Assay
summary: Revvity gains FDA clearance for IDS' Total Testosterone assay, expanding its automated endocrine testing platform for reproductive diagnostics.

raw.headline: RVTY Expands Endocrine Diagnostics With FDA-Cleared Testosterone Assay
